message:
test(fortify): add 51 integration tests for _FORTIFY_SOURCE ABI + dedup 3 matrix symbols

New test file: fortify_abi_test.rs covering memory ops (__memcpy_chk,
__memmove_chk, __memset_chk, __explicit_bzero_chk), string ops (__strcpy_chk,
__strncpy_chk, __strcat_chk, __strncat_chk, __stpcpy_chk, __stpncpy_chk),
wide string ops (__wcscpy_chk, __wcsncpy_chk, __wcscat_chk, __wcsncat_chk,
__wmemcpy_chk, __wmemmove_chk, __wmemset_chk), printf family (__sprintf_chk,
__snprintf_chk), read/pread ops, path ops (__getcwd_chk, __readlink_chk,
__realpath_chk, __gethostname_chk, __confstr_chk), multibyte conversion
(__mbstowcs_chk, __wcstombs_chk, __wctomb_chk, __mbsrtowcs_chk,
__wcsrtombs_chk), poll (__poll_chk, __ppoll_chk), __fdelt_chk, and
open variants (__open_2, __open64_2, __openat_2, __openat64_2).

Also removes 3 duplicate symbols from support_matrix.json: __gconv,
__gconv_close, __resolv_context_freeres. Total now 3980.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
